sources.exact_document_title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
sources.version: Official ACC key-points summary of the 2024 multisociety guideline
sources.population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
sources.clinical_setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for a stepwise clinician-led cardiovascular risk assessment, selective testing, team-based review, and anticoagulation risk context. It does not support automatic risk scores, tests, medicine changes, bridging, or doses, and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_sections.heading: Key points 1-4 - stepwise cardiovascular assessment, selective testing, and team care
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.

exact_sections.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

archive.title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
archive.population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
archive.setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Key points 1-4 - stepwise cardiovascular assessment, selective testing, and team care
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

sources.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Review of the available medical record
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.

exact_sections.heading: Patient interview and focused examination
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

exact_sections.heading: Tests, consultations, consent, and documentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-selected tests or consultations, consent for anesthesia care, and recording the assessment in the medical record.
